_synthetic: Committed demo/test fixture. Every value, rent, and range is INVENTED — this is NOT a real RentCast pull and contains no real property valuations (master plan §6.6 / §8.2). property_ids reuse entities.json (101/102 -> owner o_1, 103 -> owner o_2, 104 unowned). 102 (Buckley Ave) is deliberately UNVALUED (feed returned no data for the address) to exercise the unvalued bucket at owner grain. 103 (Cedar Ct) carries a stale as_of (2026-01-01, > 45 days before the 2026-07-05 anchor) to exercise the amber stale badge.
